meta.title: Why a Russian fighter took out an American drone near Ukraine
meta.description:
Last week, a pair of Russian Su-27 fighters intercepted an American MQ-9 Reaper drone operating over the international waters of the Black Sea. In the days that followed, a variety of competing narratives emerged. Russia has contended that the U.S. Air Force drone seemed to crash all on its own, while American officials have claimed in no uncertain terms that the Reaper went down only after one of the Russian jets crashed into it.

Let's dive into what REALLY happened last Tuesday.
